consensus_summary: The board approves a reduced, phase-gated reorganization: eleven final bundles instead of twelve masters, with the maintenance-skeptic's cuts applied throughout — architecture-manager is dissolved (its four pattern sub-skills redistribute to ops-manager and developer-manager, its absorbed skills stay standalone), data-manager shrinks to a single gated-batch skill, media-manager becomes an in-place extension of the shipped youtube-extraction bundle, and cross-cli-skill-transpiler is replaced by an on-demand mirror policy. The extend-in-place slug rule is applied universally (github, project-manager, skills-manager, youtube-extraction, ac-logo commands all keep their installed names), and every contested-ownership item was resolved to exactly one home: session handoff → project-manager, session-JSONL toolkit and token-efficiency → agent-manager, /diagnose-runbook → quality-manager, shell-fleet trio → ops-manager, /get-secret → ops-manager. Sub-skills trigger independently per the github precedent, so masters are ownership/routing heads, not runtime gates; every sub-skill keeps its own trigger-rich frontmatter, developer-manager's two mega-group files are cancelled in favor of a thin router over the 34 standalone stack skills, and ~25 commands were cut or merged (verb-first renames applied: /handoff, /burndown, /propose-enhancements deferred, /apply-script, /search-sessions). Verified counts (142/84/5, 25 commands) replace the taxonomy's stale figures, and a Phase-0 charter PR must ship the routing-model statement, the 142-directory disposition ledger, the command-namespace registry, and the boundary sentences before any skill PR lands. Phase 1 (github + project-manager + skills-manager) is hard-gated before Phase 2 masters proceed.

final_master_skills.name: github
final_master_skills.mission: Own all git and GitHub mechanics — branches, worktrees, PRs, merges, releases, and repo hygiene — as an in-place extension of the existing installed `github` bundle (slug unchanged), absorbing the nine satellite git skills and closing the mined gaps: sync-local-to-dev, PR 800-line splits, worktree lifecycle/lock recovery, changelog preview, big-binary policy.

subskills.name: commit
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `github`. Stage, pull with conflict resolution, conventional-commit, push. Unchanged.

subskills.name: ship
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `github`. Feature-branch PR into dev; gains the merge/keep/discard decision gate from finishing-a-development-branch and generic pre-PR gates (tests, 400-warn/800-hard size cap routing to pr-splitter) from pre-pr.
subskills.existing_name: github (sub-skill: ship); absorbs finishing-a-development-branch, pre-pr (generic gates only)

subskills.name: merge
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `github`. Merge PR(s) with merge commit + full cleanup; ends with local dev fast-forward; optional post-merge apply-script location handed off to ops-manager (locate and delegate, never execute deploy logic here).

subskills.name: release
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `github`. Promote dev to main; adds version-parity gate (displayed app version must match derived tag).

subskills.name: release-init
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `github`. Release-Automation Standard provisioning; extended with version-stamp wiring and README badge conformance (absorbs the repo-badge-audit opportunity — no separate command).

subskills.name: prune
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `github`. Stale branch/remote cleanup; extended with orphaned-worktree detection under <repo>-wt/.worktrees and branch-drift reporting (absorbs the branch-sync-audit opportunity — no separate command).

subskills.name: publish
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `github`. Repo init/publish; gains suggest-only prototype-git-bootstrap mode (never auto-init — honcho-mcp-test is deliberately un-gitted for secrets reasons).

subskills.name: worktree-task-lifecycle
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `github`. Full per-task worktree lifecycle: create under <repo>-wt/.worktrees, post-merge idempotent removal, Windows file-lock recovery, credentials-stay-in-primary-checkout rules, identical-file pull-collision handling. Single lifecycle authority that merge/prune and agent-manager delegate to.
subskills.existing_name: using-git-worktrees, worktree-isolated-loop (git-isolation half; loop-handoff prose → project-manager loop-prompt-composer)

subskills.name: pr-splitter
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `github`. Split oversized branches/PRs into stacked atomic PRs under the 400/800 cap, preserving risk seams and generated-artifact groupings; documented cap-exemption path for test-heavy diffs.

subskills.name: additive-merge-conflict-resolution
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `github`. Union-keep-both resolution for append-only/registry-file conflicts. Lifted into the bundle unchanged.

subskills.name: crlf-gitattributes-normalization
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `github`. Line-ending hygiene via .gitattributes for mixed Windows/Linux repos. Lifted unchanged.

subskills.name: large-asset-vendoring
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `github`. One big-binary policy: decision table first (LFS vs chunk-split vs don't-commit), then mechanics — LFS scoped to assets/ (ai-tag-browser) or ffmpeg split/stitch fallback (osint_worldview).

commands.name: commit
commands.description: Existing command, unchanged

commands.name: ship
commands.description: Existing command; gains size-cap gate routing to pr-splitter

commands.name: merge
commands.description: Existing command; gains post-merge apply delegation + dev fast-forward

commands.name: release
commands.description: Existing command; gains version-parity gate

commands.name: release-init
commands.description: Existing command; extended with version stamp + badge conformance

commands.name: prune
commands.description: Existing command; extended with orphan-worktree detection

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Existing command; extended with suggest-only prototype bootstrap mode

commands.name: sync-dev
commands.description: Fast-forward local dev to origin/dev + fetch --prune (requested near-verbatim in AC_OSM, WinAppProfiles, dropbox_audit — multi-repo evidence, survives the skeptic's single-incident criterion)

commands.name: changelog-preview
commands.description: Dry-run dev→main release notes (asked twice in ac-repo-radar)

commands.name: split-pr
commands.description: Invoke pr-splitter on the current oversized branch/PR with AskUserQuestion confirmation

absorbs_existing: stale-symbolic-ref-detection-and-repair (git slice only; general verify-before-destructive half → ops-manager diagnostics-probe)
final_master_skills.notes: Keep slug `github` — never rename an installed bundle. Cut commands vs draft: /branch-sync-audit (folded into prune/sync-dev), /repo-badge-audit (folded into release-init), /prototype-git-bootstrap (mode of publish). superpowers:using-git-worktrees / finishing-a-development-branch precedence is declared via skills-manager's external-skill-intake (single owner of plugin-precedence declarations). Add hook-interaction note: unattended /burndown and /loop runs must document handling of the git-push-opens-Zed PreToolUse hook. Homeradar-branded pre-pr archive copy is deleted with README/manifest parity in the same PR. Regenerate diagram.html. Sub-skill descriptions open with 'Sub-skill of `github`.'

final_master_skills.name: project-manager
final_master_skills.mission: Own the spec→plan→task lifecycle, backlogs, session continuity, and handoff prompts — the SOLE owner of 'give me a prompt for the next session' and all single-agent multi-turn loop composition and durable state files. Extends the existing installed `project-manager` bundle in place (slug unchanged).

subskills.name: what-next
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `project-manager`. Existing triage head moved into the bundle; gains workspace mode (which of ~45 repos next, absorbing the repo-picker half of the workspace skill).

subskills.name: session-handoff
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `project-manager`. SOLE owner of copy-ready next-session prompts in ANY repo — absorbs session-management (checkpoint/tiered-summarization), continue-new-session, state-file-driven-multi-turn-resumption, and recursive-batch-handoff. The trigger phrase 'give me a prompt for the next session' lives here exclusively; agent-manager's description must not claim it.

subskills.name: loop-prompt-composer
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `project-manager`. Canonical STATE-block /loop prompt composition (40+ hand-written instances across 3 repos); absorbs self-paced-loop-iteration and iterative-development doctrine. Stall-recovery text REMOVED — references agent-manager's stalled-agent-recovery instead of duplicating reset --soft procedure.

subskills.name: backlog-burndown
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `project-manager`. THIN WRAPPER composing loop-prompt-composer + existing /iterate-tasks dispatch + github /merge — must not re-describe the iteration contract /iterate-tasks already owns (redundancy-checker requirement).

subskills.name: orchestrator-bookkeeping
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `project-manager`. Batched chore(orchestrator) PR: checkbox flips, status transitions, task archival, doc-drift repair; absorbs spec-consistency-doc-refactoring-pattern and the project-tracking half of two-surface-observability-reconciliation (specs-vs-living-backlog reconciliation).

subskills.name: learnings-ledger
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `project-manager`. progress.md + learnings intake pen + generated STATUS.md rollup with rotation and staleness gates, ported from AC_OPBTA's mandatory pattern (228 sessions of use); wires into existing sync-status rather than replacing it.

subskills.name: backfill-features
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `project-manager`. Reverse-engineer specs for existing code via subagent fanout (WinAppProfiles 10-spec session); absorbs retro-fit-spec (de-branded), spec-align (gap-analysis companion mode), and existing-repo (mandatory analysis phase). feature-start merges into the existing add-feature sub-skill, not here.

subskills.name: operator-runbook-authoring
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `project-manager`. Plan=why, runbook=how: pre-flight, canary ordering, resumable steps, dry-run-before-confirm (dropbox_audit + repo-radar evidence). Built on doc-coauthoring, whose GENERIC documentation workflow is preserved as a documented mode, not lost.

commands.name: handoff
commands.description: Verb-first rename of /next-action-handoff; generates the next-session prompt in any repo; /continue-new-session kept as back-compat alias

commands.name: burndown
commands.description: Verb-first rename of /backlog-burndown; unattended backlog drain via the thin-wrapper sub-skill

commands.name: loop-prompt
commands.description: Emit (without running) the canonical STATE-block /loop prompt

commands.name: backfill-features
commands.description: Reverse-engineer feature specs via subagent fanout against the canonical template

commands.name: log-learning
commands.description: Append to intake pen/progress.md; end-of-session mode drains, rotates, regenerates STATUS.md

commands.name: what-next
commands.description: Existing /what-next and /what-next-update move into the bundle unchanged

commands.name: add-feature
commands.description: Standalone top-level add-feature skill merges into the existing project-manager add-feature sub-skill; one command remains

absorbs_existing: workspace (repo-picker half only; API-contract half is a dissent)
final_master_skills.notes: CUT per skeptic single-incident criterion: product-inception-pack + /init-product (recovery_app only; also confusable with /init-project), enhancement-bundle + /propose-enhancements (one ai-prompt-optimizer session), /repo-ops-index (ops-manager defines the ops-index convention, skills-manager owns repo-local skill generation mechanics). pm-root spec-root convention lives in the master SKILL.md, not a sub-skill. Master SKILL.md must contain: (a) the ratified boundary sentence verbatim — 'project-manager owns single-agent multi-turn loop composition and durable state files; agent-manager owns multi-agent dispatch, recovery, and session-JSONL infrastructure'; (b) a hook-interaction section declaring progress.md, backlog.md, docs/learnings/, docs/alignment/ as sanctioned outputs for the doc-blocker PreToolUse hook; (c) diagram.html row. what-next-workspace directory is eval artifacts, not a skill — delete outright. zillow_tracker's 11 rebranded command copies get an /update-skill sweep in the same PR series.

final_master_skills.name: skills-manager
final_master_skills.mission: Own the full lifecycle of the skill archive — discovery, sync, install, parity enforcement, rationalization, fleet installed-copy hygiene, external-catalog intake, and one-shot rollout. Slug stays `skills-manager` (no rename). Owns the reorg's own tooling: disposition ledger, command-namespace registry, and plugin-precedence declarations.

subskills.name: lifecycle-operations
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `skills-manager`. The nine existing operations carried over largely verbatim; every mutating operation now ends with a skill-parity-guard pass; /backfill-diagrams retires into parity fix mode; on-demand Codex mirroring documented here (replaces the transpiler).

subskills.name: skill-parity-guard
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `skills-manager`. Post-change validation/auto-fix: README rows, manifest.json regeneration (scripts/generate-manifest.py), diagram.html, installer bundle-spec completeness incl. rules/ and references/, global-profile copy agreement. Fix mode adds/repairs but only PROPOSES deletions — curators delete, never automation. Read-only mode IS /audit-skills.

subskills.name: skill-rationalization
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `skills-manager`. Pairwise overlap/conflict/merge methodology from docs/rationalization.md plus map-driven slug consolidation (consolidate_skills.py pattern) with reference rewriting and dangling-reference checks; ends with a parity pass.

subskills.name: skill-batch-curation
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `skills-manager`. Bulk-install staged drafts (generalizes curate_install.py): frontmatter validation, slug dedupe routing near-duplicates to rationalization, parity-guard instead of string surgery.

subskills.name: installed-copy-sweep
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `skills-manager`. One fleet scan merging four mined variants: marker backfill (neurorep_v3's 14 unmarked), legacy-format sweep (github-awesome flat files), rebranded-copy detection (zillow_tracker's 11 HomeRadar commands — reconciled via project-manager's conventions, not blind archive-align), vendored-skill discovery (honcho-src), plus script-repatriation hints.

subskills.name: external-skill-intake
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `skills-manager`. Catalog diffing/import ranking; absorbs superpowers-overrides as the adapted-external-copy policy AND becomes the single owner of ALL plugin-precedence declarations (superpowers, impeccable, interface-design, codex collisions declared here, referenced by other masters).

commands.name: skill-rollout
commands.description: Parity pass → /ship → /push-skill → memory rollout note as one pipeline (invokes github /ship as-is, never reimplements it)

commands.name: scout-external-skills
commands.description: Diff external catalog clones against the archive, rank imports

commands.name: claude-md-skill-list-sync
commands.description: Reconcile repo CLAUDE.md Skills sections with installed reality — scoped strictly to Skills sections, never restructures other sections (claude-md-management plugin territory)

commands.name: sweep-installed-copies
commands.description: Run installed-copy-sweep across one repo or the whole fleet

commands.name: skills-manager
commands.description: Existing interactive dispatcher, extended operation set

commands.description: Existing, extended with sweep anomaly classes

commands.description: Existing, now ends with parity pass; gains on-demand cross-CLI mirror mode

final_master_skills.notes: CUT: cross-cli-skill-transpiler and /transpile-skill (skeptic) — replaced by policy: Codex mirrors created on demand when a skill is actually used from Codex, Gemini frozen at 5, /audit-skills reports the gap informationally, mirrors carry a source-version stamp so parity-guard flags staleness. base is NOT absorbed (universal coding patterns — stays standalone, remove architecture-manager's requires:[base] since that master is cut). This master owns three reorg deliverables shipped in Phase 0/1: the 142-directory disposition ledger, the command-namespace registry with a generic-verb naming rule, and CLAUDE.md (repo) count/command-table corrections (142/84/5, retired /backfill-diagrams, rules/ bundle subdirectory documented). skill-creator plugin boundary: skill-creator writes, skills-manager archives/ships.

final_master_skills.name: agent-manager
final_master_skills.mission: Own multi-agent orchestration mechanics and agent-session infrastructure: fanout, batching, recovery, session-JSONL parsing/search/mining, token-efficiency (canonical single page), and agent/MCP/model configuration. Explicitly NOT session handoff prompts (project-manager) and NOT honcho/graphify (standalone, cross-referenced).

subskills.name: fleet-repo-fanout
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `agent-manager`. Parallel subagent per repo/lens with structured output contract and merged report (proven twice in ai-agent-kit: 11-repo rollout, 19-agent mining); absorbs subagent-driven-development's fresh-agent + two-stage-review doctrine as the single-repo case. Design-manager and project-manager delegate their fanout phases here.

subskills.name: parallel-workstream-launcher
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `agent-manager`. workstreams.json + worktree-per-agent harness (neurorep_v3 family), paths parameterized; worktree hygiene delegates to github worktree-task-lifecycle/prune.

subskills.name: binpacked-batch-dispatch
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `agent-manager`. Weight-balanced batch manifests + central serial merge invariant (ai-history-analysis pass2, ran the full mining pipeline twice).

subskills.name: stalled-agent-recovery
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `agent-manager`. CANONICAL stall/salvage/re-dispatch procedure (reset --soft, narrowed scope, never restart from dev) — project-manager's loops reference it, never duplicate it; cleanup delegates to github.

subskills.name: llm-json-output-repair
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `agent-manager`. CANONICAL single home of repair_results.py + UUID-stem-keyed merge (redundancy requirement — gated-batch references, never re-encodes).

subskills.name: session-jsonl-toolkit
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `agent-manager`. CANONICAL Claude Code JSONL parsing (noise filtering, sidechain exclusion, content-block extraction, token usage) — sole copy; the three duplicated implementations and utilities-manager's proposed fourth are all retired. Also the canonical token-efficiency page (session diagnosis + long-running-script mechanics: background runs, log sinks, summary scripts) per the skeptic's one-home rule; utilities and gated-batch cross-reference.

subskills.name: history-mining-pipeline
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `agent-manager`. Runnable index→extract→dispatch→repair→merge→consolidate→curate pipeline; absorbs analyze-conversations as its recurring-friction-audit mode.

subskills.name: agent-coordination
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `agent-manager`. Multi-agent shared-state claiming/handoff conventions ONLY (absorbs team-coordination) — all next-session handoff-prompt content and triggers stripped and ceded to project-manager session-handoff.

subskills.name: agent-runtime-config
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `agent-manager`. Model ids, SDK patterns, LLM-app patterns (absorbs ai-models, agentic-development, llm-patterns) plus the review-model-config convention (per-machine model ids) that quality-manager's code-review consumes.

subskills.name: mcp-wiring-verification
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `agent-manager`. .mcp.json authoring with env-var token indirection, tool-loading verification, SDK/REST parity cross-check (honcho-mcp-test).

commands.name: fleet-fanout
commands.description: One-line launcher for an identical change/analysis across C:\development repos

commands.name: launch-workstreams
commands.description: Generate/execute a workstreams.json parallel run, dry-run default

commands.name: recover-agent
commands.description: Salvage a stalled worker's branch and re-dispatch narrowed

commands.name: search-sessions
commands.description: SOLE session-history command (verb-first name from utilities design, ownership per taxonomy): search local JSONL for past prompts/decisions with provenance, incl. cleared-session recovery

commands.name: mine-history
commands.description: Run the full history-mining pipeline, resumable across tranches

commands.name: token-report
commands.description: Token-usage diagnosis from local JSONL; absorbs usage-limit-reducer's user-facing flow — its verbatim triggers ('hit my limit', 'running out of tokens', 'which model should I use') MUST appear in the bundle frontmatter description (dx hard requirement)

commands.name: verify-mcp
commands.description: Lint .mcp.json for secrets, confirm tool loading, run SDK/REST parity check

final_master_skills.notes: honcho and graphify are NOT absorbed — live plugin/global-trigger wiring; they stay standalone and are cross-referenced under Session Infrastructure (disposition ledger entries). session-management goes to project-manager, NOT here. Boundary sentence written verbatim in this SKILL.md and project-manager's. Diagram.html row required. Sub-skill descriptions open with 'Sub-skill of `agent-manager`.'

final_master_skills.name: quality-manager
final_master_skills.mission: Own everything that proves code works before it ships: multi-engine code review, TDD enforcement, security gates, the CANONICAL launch-and-observe verification recipes (all surfaces), container smoke tests, compliance-gate authoring, and bug-fix kickoff.

subskills.name: code-review
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `quality-manager`. Merges code-review + codex-review + gemini-review + requesting-code-review into one multi-engine sub-skill; model IDs read from agent-manager's review-model-config convention, never hardcoded (gpt-5.2→5.5 override lesson); reports 800-line cap breaches but github adjudicates them.

subskills.name: security-review
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `quality-manager`. OWASP patterns + secrets + supply-chain dependency review; references (not restates) the global security rules. Boundary with ops secrets-ops: this owns code-level secret hygiene, ops owns operational storage/rotation.

subskills.name: tdd
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `quality-manager`. RED/GREEN/IMPROVE + 80% floor; references, not restates, ~/.claude/rules/testing.md and superpowers:test-driven-development.

subskills.name: e2e-playwright
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `quality-manager`. Playwright E2E generation/maintenance + /e2e agent dispatch.

subskills.name: visual-verify-loop
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `quality-manager`. THE canonical launch-and-observe recipe for every surface: web (incl. the browser-console classification table folded in from the deferred browser-console-triage design — hydration/SSR/silent-htmx symptom→cause→fix), Windows desktop (stop-instance/rebuild/launch/window-handle — dotnet-wpf REFERENCES this with WPF parameters only, no duplicate), generated-artifact HTML (serve dist/ + zero-console-error checklist), console apps. Launching delegates to start-app/run; this owns observe-and-judge.

subskills.name: container-smoke-test
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `quality-manager`. Build, run, /healthz poll, endpoint matrix, log dump, guaranteed teardown (hand-rolled twice in ac-repo-radar + compose churn in ai-prompt-optimizer/phoneinfoga). Pre-ship only; post-deploy verification is ops-manager's.

subskills.name: compliance-gate-authoring
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `quality-manager`. check-* script families, git-hook installers, CI wiring, lint/coverage baseline regenerate-and-commit discipline (SOLE home — AC_OSM baseline content removed from developer-manager), and the /diagnose-runbook generator (SOLE owner).

subskills.name: audit-gate
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `quality-manager`. Two-consecutive-clean-rounds streak-reset convergence protocol, absorbed essentially unchanged.

subskills.name: fix-start
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `quality-manager`. Bug-fix kickoff generalized from homeradar-fix-start (SEV table, reproduce-first, verification pairing); HomeRadar paths become configurable; /update-skill pass for zillow_tracker's installed copy in the same PR series.

subskills.name: code-deduplication
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `quality-manager`. Capability-index check-before-write + versioned-script-sprawl consolidation, wired into the review checklist.

commands.name: code-review
commands.description: Existing global command moves into the bundle with name unchanged; fleet /update-skill sweep ships in the same PR series

final_master_skills.notes: NO /verify command ships — the built-in harness verify skill and superpowers:verification-before-completion already own that trigger; quality-manager's sub-skills are the deep per-surface recipes the built-in routes into, and this precedence is declared via skills-manager's external-skill-intake (resolves the collision this design round per dx). Aesthetic critique is design-manager's ('does it work' here vs 'is it good' there). Diagram.html row required.

final_master_skills.name: developer-manager
final_master_skills.mission: Thin stack-router over the how-to-build knowledge for every stack: detect the stack from repo signals, route to the matching skill, enforce the verify-before-done contract by reference to quality-manager. The 34 existing stack/platform/db/commerce skills STAY STANDALONE with improved trigger-rich frontmatter — no mega-group files, no relocation (skeptic resolution satisfying the architect's independent-triggering requirement).

subskills.name: powershell
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `developer-manager`. Dedupes three independent formulations (AC_OSM, ac-work-launcher, batch-4): Pester 5 TDD, PSScriptAnalyzer baselines (discipline content points to quality-manager's compliance-gate-authoring), $PROFILE marker blocks, wt.exe/pwsh pitfalls, elevation/env-scope; references remote-installer (utilities) for install.ps1.

subskills.name: dotnet-wpf
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `developer-manager`. MVVM layering, DI, XAML theming, xUnit/Moq, Deploy-Local/MSIX (WinAppProfiles). Verification loop is a REFERENCE to quality-manager's visual-verify-loop with WPF-specific parameters only — no embedded duplicate (architect + redundancy requirement).

subskills.name: local-dev-harness
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `developer-manager`. Discovery AND generation: forward-auth dev proxy, idempotent seed data with -NoSeed, Start-App.ps1 generation (hand-rolled in 4+ repos); /dev-proxy and /seed-dev become documented modes, not commands.

subskills.name: openapi-contract-codegen
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `developer-manager` (relocated from cut architecture-manager). openapi.yaml SoT → dockerized dual codegen + drift checks (zillow_tracker).

subskills.name: deterministic-build-fingerprinting
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `developer-manager` (relocated). Code semver + content hash8, manifest sidecar, no-timestamps contract, build-twice gate (ai-tag-browser + AC_OPBTA deploy dependency); hard cross-reference to ops deploy-idempotency gate — this side owns the 'no timestamps' contract as canonical.

subskills.name: data-tracker-scaffold
subskills.description: Sub-skill of `developer-manager` (relocated). Scrape→dedupe/retention→JSON→static dashboard→Docker/nginx shape (telegram_url_tracker/zillow/flights family); delegates HTML rendering conventions to design-manager's html-mockup-prototyper packaging layer and startup-script consumption to start-app.

final_master_skills.name: ops-manager
final_master_skills.mission: Own live-infrastructure operations on the self-hosted fleet: idempotent apply scripts with two-pass gates, diagnostics-first probes and domain ladders, service/host lifecycle, internal-registry deploys, operational secrets (sole owner of /get-secret), observability dashboards, GPU placement — plus the shell-fleet runtime/helper consolidation work inherited from the dissolved architecture-manager.

subskills.description: Sub-skill of `ops-manager`. The AC_OPBTA apply-script contract (200+ instances): lock, control-node SSH, two-pass gate, verify, self-commit, lint contract, naming/retention policy killing fix-v2/v3 sprawl. Branch discipline stated explicitly: self-commits flow through feature-branch → PR per global git-workflow rules; AC_OPBTA's direct-commit convention is a repo-local exception documented in that repo's thin installed index, never taught as archive default (dx requirement).

Owns the repo-local ops-index CONVENTION (project-manager's /repo-ops-index command dropped; skills-manager owns generation mechanics).

final_master_skills.notes: DROPPED per skeptic single-use criterion (evidence preserved as references/ pointers in this skill): pdf-document-mining (irs), human-review-gate-webui (dropbox_audit), report-then-apply-merge (KeepassMerge), dropbox-api (dropbox_audit), rule-based-taxonomy-classifier, batch-scoring-reconciliation (repair half was agent-manager's anyway). Boundary sentence cross-referenced with project-manager: gated-batch owns per-ITEM machine state; project-manager owns per-SESSION handoff/loop pacing — 'resume the batch' routes on whether durable item state exists. Diagram.html required.

changes_applied: Stated the routing/triggering model in a Phase-0 charter: sub-skills trigger independently via their own frontmatter (github precedent), masters are ownership/routing heads not runtime gates, every sub-skill keeps a trigger-rich description opening with 'Sub-skill of `<master>`.' (architect, consistency)

Cut architecture-manager as a master: shared-runtime-extraction + the shell trio → ops-manager; openapi-contract-codegen, deterministic-build-fingerprinting, data-tracker-scaffold → developer-manager; database-schema, security-aware-persistence-design, scanner-plugin-integration stay standalone; worldview-layer-scaffold + worldview-shader-preset merge into one standalone worldview-scaffolds skill (maintenance-skeptic)

Shrunk data-manager to the single gated-batch skill absorbing csv-driven-llm-pipeline + content-aware-file-renaming; dropped pdf-document-mining, human-review-gate, report-then-apply-merge, dropbox-api, taxonomy-classifier pending second use (maintenance-skeptic)

Cancelled media-manager: youtube-extraction extended in place under its shipped slug, adding only channel-tracker, talk-extraction, and prd-forensics; TTS/manual-generation/media-repair parked as references/ (maintenance-skeptic, dx, architect)

Applied the extend-in-place slug rule universally: github, project-manager, skills-manager (rename to skill-manager dropped), youtube-extraction, and all ac-logo command names retained; every absorption that deletes a referenced name ships its fleet /update-skill + CLAUDE.md reference-rewrite sweep in the same PR series (architect, dx, consistency, skeptic)

Killed cross-cli-skill-transpiler; replaced with policy — Codex mirrors on demand, Gemini frozen at 5, /audit-skills reports the gap informationally, mirrors carry source-version stamps (skeptic, consistency)

Resolved every contested ownership to one home: session-management + all next-session-handoff triggers → project-manager session-handoff exclusively; session-jsonl-toolkit + history search → agent-manager with the single verb-first /search-sessions command (utilities' duplicate deleted); /diagnose-runbook → quality-manager only; token-efficiency → one canonical page in agent-manager; /get-secret → ops-manager outright; shell-fleet trio co-located under ops-manager (architect, redundancy, dx, skeptic)

Removed duplicated recipes: windows-desktop-verify lives only in quality-manager's visual-verify-loop (dotnet-wpf references it), browser-console classification and serve-dist checklist fold into visual-verify-loop, lint-baseline discipline lives only in compliance-gate-authoring, stall-recovery (reset --soft) lives only in agent-manager's stalled-agent-recovery, llm-json-output-repair is the single home of the repair scripts, worktree OAuth-loss lesson canonical in github's worktree-task-lifecycle with pointers elsewhere (redundancy, architect)

Replaced developer-manager's web-stacks and data-and-platform-stacks mega-files with a thin router over the 34 standalone stack skills whose frontmatter is improved in place; deferred go-development, fastapi-htmx, python-app-scaffolds, ollama-integration, browser-console-triage pending second-project evidence (skeptic resolution satisfying architect's independent-triggering and no-merged-files requirements)

Cut ~25 commands: /verify (built-in wins — precedence declared, no rename shipped), /guide, /profile-perf, /check-mirrors (reintroduced a rejected taxonomy item), /publish-report, /repo-badge-audit, /branch-sync-audit, /prototype-git-bootstrap, /transpile-skill, /repo-ops-index, /init-product, /enhancement-bundle, /apply-ux-feedback (merged into /screenshot-review batch mode), /gen-start-app (mode of /start-app), /scaffold-cli, /dev-proxy, /seed-dev, /triage-console, /generate-manual, /narrate, /repair-video, /search-sessions duplicate, /get-secret duplicate, /rotate-secret (skeptic, redundancy, dx)

Applied verb-first naming: /handoff, /burndown, /loop-prompt, /apply-script, /probe-incident, /add-dashboard, /search-sessions; commissioned a command-namespace registry with a generic-verb rule as a Phase-0 deliverable (dx, architect)

Ratified and required verbatim boundary sentences: project-manager (single-agent loops + state files) vs agent-manager (multi-agent dispatch/recovery/JSONL); gated-batch (per-item data-plane state) vs project-manager (session-plane resumption); quality (observe/judge + pre-ship smoke) vs developer (launch) vs ops (post-deploy); design (is it good) vs quality (does it work) (architect, dx, redundancy)
Named skills-manager's external-skill-intake the single owner of all plugin-precedence declarations (superpowers, impeccable, interface-design, codex, built-in verify) (redundancy)

Commissioned the 142-directory disposition ledger closing every orphan: base, explain-code, visual-explainer, vercel-deploy-claimable, site-architecture, honcho, graphify, database-schema, security-aware-persistence-design, scanner-plugin-integration, worldview-scaffolds stay standalone; feature-start merges into add-feature; stale-symbolic-ref splits git-half→github / general-half→ops diagnostics-probe; two-surface-observability splits observability→ops / project-tracking→project-manager; what-next-workspace eval artifacts deleted outright; workspace API-contract half escalated to human (architect, redundancy, consistency)

Corrected all counts to the verified 142/84/5 (+25 global commands) and required CLAUDE.md (repo) updates — Management Commands table, retired /backfill-diagrams, rules/ bundle subdirectory — in the owning PRs (consistency)

Added mandatory package-wide follow-through to every deletion PR: README row + manifest.json regeneration + diagram.html + installed-copy sweep, via skill-parity-guard; parity-guard fix mode proposes but never executes deletions (consistency, skill-manager design)

Added hook-interaction sections: PM state files declared sanctioned outputs for the doc-blocker PreToolUse hook; unattended /burndown and /loop runs document handling of the git-push Zed-review hook (dx)
Made ops-manager's apply-script contract state feature-branch → PR discipline explicitly, with AC_OPBTA direct-commit as a repo-local exception in that repo's thin installed index (dx)

Preserved usage-limit-reducer's verbatim trigger phrases in agent-manager's frontmatter as a hard requirement, and preserved doc-coauthoring's generic documentation workflow as a documented mode inside operator-runbook-authoring (dx, PM design risk note)

Adopted the skeptic's hard phase gate: Phase 1 = github + project-manager + skills-manager only; P1 masters proceed only after Phase 1 ships and its sub-skills have demonstrably fired in real sessions
Added diagram.html rows to all master SKILL.md outlines and standardized sub-skill frontmatter to the 'Sub-skill of `<master>`.' convention (consistency)
dissents_unresolved: workspace skill's API-contract-tracking / cross-repo-topology half has no willing owner (repo-picker half went to project-manager's what-next): fold into project-manager orchestrator-bookkeeping, give to developer-manager, or delete outright — human decision required before the workspace skill directory is removed.

Deferred single-repo sub-skills (go-development, fastapi-htmx, python-app-scaffolds/PyQt, ollama-integration, product-inception-pack, enhancement-bundle, raw-json-to-domain-panel, pdf-document-mining, human-review-gate-webui, report-then-apply-merge, dropbox-api, rule-based-taxonomy-classifier, TTS/manual-generation recipes): the maintenance-skeptic says drop until a second project needs them; the domain designs treat the mined content as real production expertise worth staging. Decide: drop entirely (git history is the archive) vs stage as status:draft references/ inside the owning bundles. The plan currently follows the skeptic (drop/park), but this discards authored evidence the human may want captured now.

Quality-manager's absorption of the global code-review/tdd/test-coverage/e2e commands: applied as move-into-bundle-keeping-names with the fleet sweep in the same PR series, but the maintenance-skeptic's wording ('stay where installed copies reference them... or not happen') also supports leaving them as standalone global commands forever. Zero-churn option remains open to the human.

Phase-gating strictness: the maintenance-skeptic (sole reject-restructure verdict) requires Phase 2 to wait for demonstrated real-session usage of Phase-1 sub-skills; the four approve-with-changes reviewers accepted the full package. The implementation order encodes the hard gate — human should confirm whether P1 masters may proceed on calendar/capacity instead of usage evidence.

console-output-style placement in design-manager (visual-review-loop argument) vs a tooling/PowerShell home (AC_OSM/Spectre/Pester argument): design-manager claims it per its designer, no reviewer contested it directly, but the design itself asked for board confirmation — flagging for the human since it's a judgment call, not an evidence call.
